background: Homeworld: Banasdan (SR 2920 — High Tech, subsector capital, Imperial). Established the Lakamsal signals relay 14 months ago and has been managing it since. Brilliant at analysis, poor at improvisation. Has a procedure for every situation and follows it precisely. Currently arriving at Lakamsal in 72 hours — the same extraction window as BLIND SERPENT. This is not a coincidence that helps the players. HIDDEN: She is making personal encrypted backups of the relay's traffic metadata. HIDDEN: She was the junior analyst who processed Breckenridge's burned asset file twelve years ago — she would recognise his signals signature if she analysed the Kethara ECM anomalies in detail. She does not know this yet.
education: Imperial Naval Academy (line officer track). Naval Intelligence advanced certification.
terms: Navy (Line): Electronics (comms)-1, Pilot (spacecraft)-1, Recon-1, Tactics (naval)-1. Standard line officer rotation. Advanced to rank 1.

Navy (Intelligence): Electronics (comms)-2, Electronics (sensors)-1, Investigate-1, Deception-1. Initial intelligence posting. Processed Breckenridge burned asset file — filed as low-value, closed. Advanced to rank 2.
Navy (Intelligence): Investigate-2, Deception-2, Tactics (naval)-2, Gun Combat (energy)-1. Senior intelligence analyst. Advanced to rank 3.

Navy (Intelligence): Electronics (comms)-3, Investigate-3, Gun Combat (energy)-2, Persuade-1, Stealth-1. Relay controller designation, Lakamsal installation. Advanced to rank 4. Equipment: Laser Pistol, personal signal analysis tablet (TL12), two NI security agents as escort.
interactions: Role: IMPERIAL ANTAGONIST 2 — The Intelligence Threat. Arrives in 72 hours. Has authorisation to activate Ibáñez-Ochoa's sealed orders.

Critical misassessment: She believes this is Imperial corporate espionage, not a SolSec incursion. If BLIND SERPENT behaves like corporate thieves, she will pursue corporate investigation procedures rather than military lockdown — buying 6-12 hours before she recalibrates.

Key flaw: Brilliant at analysis, poor at improvisation. Has a procedure for every situation. When situation develops outside her modelling, she hesitates 1D6x10 minutes gathering more data before acting. This is the team's window.

Breckenridge connection: She wrote the assessment that burned him as a low-value asset twelve years ago. Never met him. Would not recognise his face. Would recognise his signals signature. If she analysed the Kethara ECM anomalies closely — she would find it.

Pelczar connection: Her relay's transmission fingerprint appears in Pelczar's Long Case documentation. She is not corrupt — she was never told what happened to her intelligence reports after filing them.

Her private record-keeping: She has been making personal encrypted backups of relay traffic metadata for two weeks. Her instincts say something is wrong. She has not examined this instinct too closely.

equipment.name: Naval Intelligence Encrypted Comms Suite
equipment.traits: Connects to Resolute Purpose; activates Ibáñez-Ochoa's sealed orders when used

equipment.name: Personal Signal Analysis Tablet
equipment.traits: DM+2 Electronics (comms) when reviewing transmission data

equipment.name: Personal Encrypted Metadata Backup
equipment.traits: Two weeks of relay traffic routing data and cipher identifiers — her personal insurance policy

equipment.name: Naval Intelligence Security Agents (x2)
equipment.traits: Personal escort: Army stats, TL12 equipment, Gun Combat 2 each

contacts.kind: Commander Ibáñez-Ochoa (IMS Resolute Purpose — military backstop, in-system awaiting activation signal)
291st Fleet Command (reporting chain — she has been told the increased traffic is temporary)
Unknown — she suspects someone in the chain is routing non-standard traffic through her relay and not telling her why
